emails.subject: Plant Outage Affecting "meter # 8291" Enron Methanol
emails.body: Plant Outage Affecting "meter 8291" Enron Methanol Please advise me if you want the 36.0/day term deal bought back for days July 4th July 5th. Presently, the buyback deal {#139058} is being allocated 35,261mm for day 7/4th 35,903 for day 7/5th. Daily flow for 7/4th 739mm 7/5th 97mm. The term deal of 36.0 mm has been bought back for July 6th thru July 16th.

emails.subject: Re: Plant Outage Affecting "meter # 8291" Enron Methanol
emails.body: Re: Plant Outage Affecting "meter 8291" Enron Methanol I think the methanol plant is still down? The buyback should apply for ANY volumes in July below their monthly nom of 36,000/d until the plant comes back up. From: Robert E Lloyd 07/11/2000 11:41 AM
